reviews.review_description: The app doesn't seem to recognize my smart watch. Are there any fixes for this???
Not good.
Stops after like 5 second?
The video quality is too low to trick your mind. I would faint at these heights but the videos are such low quality it doesn't feel real.
I got a little nervous. It wasnt too crazy. I thought id get to jump off high places. All this did was place you at high elevations. It was boring to me. Hoping more exciting levels are added.
All videos freeze between 5 and 6 seconds please sort
DO NOT DOWNLOAD -The worst application in this store
Video freezing

Bad quality video is unacceptable given it's downloaded and not streamed. So distracting that it takes away from the whole experience and point of the app. Also, hanging camera over edge of stuff is unnecessary. Rather point should be overcoming fear in normal situations. One thing to sit in car by edge of cliff, but cheesy to dangle far out from it, no one would do that, and thus also takes away from experience. Good idea, poorly executed.
This app don't open

Video poor resolution defeats the purpose as the brain it's not tricked to process images as real. You must replace the videos with better ones and you'll have a winner you can even charge for. Until then it's completely useless.

reviews.review_title: Will only let me see the towers!
reviews.review_description: It won't let me see the elevator or sky walk !

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you are having problems with our app and appreciate your review. Most of the bugs such as random black screens and sound errors have been fixed in our newest update. Please update your current app and kindly let us know of any additional bugs. We will try our best to reflect your comments in our next update

reviews.review_title: It was nice before the update
reviews.review_description: I was excited to see what was updated. Everything looked different. Well, the only one I was able to try, was the last one (the tower) the elevator, nor the sky walk works, it's just black with sound! Please fix this, my kids really liked it before!
